visual.name: p6GanttChartVisual
visual.description: Primavera P6-style Gantt chart with hierarchical project management, WBS levels, activities, baseline tracking, and progress visualization

en-US.Visual_NoData: Add Task Names to the data field to begin

showTooltips.description: Show rich hover tooltips on bars and milestones across all layouts.

wbsProgressMethod.description: Primavera P6-style rollup of Actual % Complete for WBS and project rows.

wbsPlannedProgressMethod.description: Primavera P6-style rollup of Planned % Complete for WBS and project rows.

pgShowBrand.displayName: Show Brand Block in Top Bar

pgLevel0Color.description: Used when the data has 1 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel1Color.description: Used when the data has 2 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel2Color.description: Used when the data has 3 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel3Color.description: Used when the data has 4 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel4Color.description: Used when the data has 5 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel5Color.description: Used when the data has 6 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel6Color.description: Used when the data has 7 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel7Color.description: Used when the data has 8 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel8Color.description: Used when the data has 9 or more hierarchy levels.

pgLevel9Color.description: Used when the data has 10 hierarchy levels.
